name: Ginger Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shortening (a mixture of butter and lard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and brown sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the eggs and beat thoroughly.
3. Stir in the molasses and baking soda dissolved in boiling water.
4. Mix the flour and ginger; sift into the other ingredients.
5. Combine all well, then pour into greased muffin pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes.
Source: Pennsylvania Dutch Cook Book - Fine Old Recipes, Culinary Arts Press, 1936.
